"'''Welcome to the Jungle'''" is an article in [[Star Wars Gamer 6|''Star Wars Gamer'' 6]] for the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]. It was written by [[Darrin Drader]], [[Steve Miller]], and [[Brandon McLendon]], with illustrations by [[Vinod Rams]].

The roleplaying adventure send the players to a [[Ithorian Herdship|herdship]] with [[Veermok/Legends|veermoks]], [[divto]]s, and [[Hoojib/Legends|Hoojibs]].
